Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Javik Leed]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 30''' — Javik is alive and lives with his family on Nyron Seven.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 44''' — Javik Leed is a former Yellow Knight of the Titan Force.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 44''' — Javik is a former Titan Knight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 44''' — Javik pilots a hover-chair.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 2''' — Javik Leed is the Yellow Knight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 7''' — Javik is a Knight who survived the destruction of his Divine Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 12''' — Javik Leed is the Yellow Knight and the team's resident Aether Technician.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 12''' — Javik is not a Combat Artist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 12''' — Javik uses a heavy two-handed rifle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 20''' — Javik is a character associated with the Yellow Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 31''' — Javik was a Titan Knight who held the title of Yellow Knight.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
